trigger_keywords: is the output string constant defined
which enum variant is used for outbound
strict validation on the string literal
hidden_constraints.oracle_response: The exact string literal 'WriteAsString' must be used for both outbound and inbound settings. This is the defined constant for converting numbers to their JSON string representation.

trigger_keywords: test cases for feature1 1 runtime configuration
show me feature1 1 runtime configuration test cases

context_pointers.vague_reference: use the same semantic grouping as the network layer configuration
context_pointers.actual_meaning: The settings must be logically clustered by transport direction (outbound/inbound) and ordered alphabetically within each group.

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_1_runtime_configuration.json.description: Configuring number serialization applies the same option to outbound and inbound JSON processing.

feature1_2_runtime_routing.json.description: Synchronous and asynchronous global calls are forwarded through the configured runtime with the requested identifier and normalized errors.

cases.expected_output:
call=sync_without_result
runtime_identifier=demo.echo
runtime_call=sync
error=runtime_call_not_implemented
call=sync_with_result
runtime_identifier=demo.echo
runtime_call=sync
error=runtime_call_not_implemented
call=async_with_result
runtime_identifier=demo.echo
runtime_call=async
error=runtime_call_not_implemented
call=async_without_result
runtime_identifier=demo.echo
runtime_call=async
error=runtime_call_not_implemented

feature2_1_partial_function_generation.j.description: Marked partial declarations are completed by generated forwarding bodies that call the corresponding global script identifier and pass declared parameters in order.

feature3_1_publish_artifacts.json.description: Publishing writes the boot library, optionally writes source maps and type definitions, controls base-directory cleaning, and reports inspection warnings without aborting.

feature3_2_library_bindings.json.description: The emitted browser library declares nested assembly objects and exposes method bindings according to imported and exported script directions.

feature3_3_type_definitions.json.description: The emitted type declaration bundle includes only allowed runtime definitions, declares assembly-shaped APIs, maps host types to script types, and reports missing imports with a neutral error.

cases.expected_output:
contains=export interface Interop {}
value=true
contains=export interface Boot {}
value=true
contains=import from
value=false
contains=other
value=false

contains=AsyBool: () => Promise<boolean>
value=true
contains=AsyVoid: () => Promise<void>
value=true

_constraints.output_rule: emit outbound_setting and inbound_setting lines, both set to value from input
